descrizione: Reduces the power of supereffective attacks taken.

effetto: Increases super-effective damage dealt to 1.25×.
descrizione: Powers up moves that are super effective.

effetto: Boosts Attack in battle.
descrizione: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat when the Pokémon enters a battle.

effetto: Boosts Defense in battle.
descrizione: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat when the Pokémon enters a battle.

effetto: Libero changes the Pokémon's type to that of its previously used attack.
descrizione: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s about to use.

effetto: If the Pokémon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.
descrizione: If the Pokémon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.

effetto: When Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
descrizione: When the Pokémon is hit by an attack, it scatters cotton fluff around and lowers the Speed stat of all Pokémon except itself.

effetto: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
descrizione: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

effetto: Reflects any stat-lowering effects.
descrizione: Bounces back only the stat-lowering effects that the Pokémon receives.

effetto: If a Cramorant with Gulp Missile uses Surf or Dive, it catches prey and changes its form depending on its remaining HP.
descrizione: When the Pokémon uses Surf or Dive, it will come back with prey. When it takes damage, it will spit out the prey to attack.

effetto: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
descrizione: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

effetto: Boosts the Speed stat drastically when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.
descrizione: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat drastically if hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.

effetto: Boosts sound-based moves and halves damage from the same moves.
descrizione: Boosts the power of sound-based moves. The Pokémon also takes half the damage from these kinds of moves.

effetto: Creates a sandstorm when hit by an attack.
descrizione: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it’s hit by an attack.

effetto: Halves damage from Special moves.
descrizione: The Pokémon is protected by ice scales, which halve the damage taken from special moves.

effetto: Doubles the effect of berries.
descrizione: Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.

effetto: The Pokémon’s ice head can take a physical attack as a substitute, but the attack also changes the Pokémon’s appearance. The ice will be restored when it snows.
descrizione: The Pokémon’s ice head can take a physical attack as a substitute, but the attack also changes the Pokémon’s appearance. The ice will be restored when it hails.

effetto: Just being next to the Pokémon powers up moves.
descrizione: Just being next to the Pokémon powers up moves.

effetto: Changes type depending on the terrain.
descrizione: Changes the Pokémon’s type depending on the terrain.

effetto: Nullifies effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil.
descrizione: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.

effetto: Powers up ally Pokémon's Steel-type moves.
descrizione: Powers up ally Pokémon’s Steel-type moves.

effetto: When hit by a move that makes direct contact, the Pokémon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.
descrizione: When hit by a move that makes direct contact, the Pokémon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.

effetto: Swaps abilities with opponents on contact.
descrizione: The Pokémon exchanges Abilities with a Pokémon that hits it with a move that makes direct contact.

effetto: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.
descrizione: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.

effetto: Neutralizes abilities of all Pokémon in battle.
descrizione: If the Pokémon with Neutralizing Gas is in the battle, the effects of all Pokémon’s Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.

effetto: Prevents the Pokémon and its allies from being poisoned.
descrizione: Protects the Pokémon and its ally Pokémon from being poisoned.

effetto: Causes Morpeko to change its form each turn, alternating between Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode
descrizione: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of each turn.

effetto: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.
descrizione: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.

effetto: Contact moves can strike through Protect/Detect.
descrizione: If the Pokémon uses moves that make direct contact, it can attack the target even if the target protects itself.

effetto: Resets all stat changes upon entering battlefield.
descrizione: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.

effetto: Powers up Electric-type moves.
descrizione: Powers up Electric-type moves.

effetto: Powers up Dragon-type moves.
descrizione: Powers up Dragon-type moves.

effetto: Boosts Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.
descrizione: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a chilling neigh, which boosts its Attack stat.

effetto: Boosts Special Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.
descrizione: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a terrifying neigh, which boosts its Sp. Atk stat.
This Ability combines the effects of both Calyrex’s Unnerve Ability and Glastrier’s Chilling Neigh Ability.
This Ability combines the effects of both Calyrex’s Unnerve Ability and Spectrier’s Grim Neigh Ability.

effetto: Contact changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.
descrizione: Contact with the Pokémon changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.

effetto: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.
descrizione: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.

effetto: Raises Attack when hit by a Fire-type move. Cannot be burned.
descrizione: Boosts the Attack stat when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire-type move. The Pokémon also cannot be burned.

effetto: When the Pokémon's HP drops below half, Anger Shell lowers its Defense and Special Defense but its Attack, Special Attack and Speed are raised.
descrizione: When an attack causes its HP to drop to half or less, the Pokémon gets angry. This lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

effetto: Protects from status conditions and halves damage from Ghost-type moves.
descrizione: The Pokémon's pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.

effetto: Immune to Fire-type moves, and Defense is sharply boosted.
descrizione: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Fire-type moves. Instead, its Defense stat is sharply boosted.

effetto: Gives immunity to wind moves, and causes the Pokémon's Attack to increase by one stage when hit by one.
descrizione: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat if Tailwind takes effect or if the Pokémon is hit by a wind move. The Pokémon also takes no damage from wind moves.

effetto: Boosts Attack if intimidated, and prevents being forced to switch out.
descrizione: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat if intimidated. Moves and items that would force the Pokémon to switch out also fail to work.

effetto: Powers up Rock-type moves.
descrizione: Powers up Rock-type moves.

effetto: When hit by a wind move, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.
descrizione: The Pokémon becomes charged when it is hit by a wind move, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

effetto: Transforms into its Hero Form when switching out.
descrizione: The Pokémon transforms into its Hero Form when it switches out.

effetto: Goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field.
descrizione: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field. The Pokémon then issues commands from there.

effetto: When hit by an attack, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.
descrizione: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

effetto: Raises highest stat in harsh sunlight, or if holding Booster Energy.
descrizione: Boosts the Pokémon's most proficient stat in harsh sunlight or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.

effetto: Raises highest stat on Electric Terrain, or if holding Booster Energy.
descrizione: Boosts the Pokémon's most proficient stat on Electric Terrain or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.

effetto: Gives immunity to status moves.
descrizione: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokémon full immunity to other Pokémon's status moves.

effetto: Lowers Special Attack of all Pokémon except itself.
descrizione: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous vessel lowers the Sp. Atk stats of all Pokémon except itself.

effetto: Lowers Defense of all Pokémon except itself.
descrizione: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous sword lowers the Defense stats of all Pokémon except itself.

effetto: Lowers Attack of all Pokémon except itself.
descrizione: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous wooden tablets lowers the Attack stats of all Pokémon except itself.

effetto: Lowers Special Defense of all Pokémon except itself.
descrizione: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous beads lowers the Sp. Def stats of all Pokémon except itself.

effetto: Turns the sunlight harsh when entering battle, and boosts Attack while active.
descrizione: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.

effetto: Creates an Electric Terrain when entering battle, and boosts Special Attack while active.
descrizione: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokémon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat on Electric Terrain.

effetto: Copies stat boosts by the opponent.
descrizione: If an opponent's stat is boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.

effetto: Causes the Pokémon to reuse an already consumed Berry at the end of the next turn.
descrizione: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.

effetto: Powers up slicing moves.
descrizione: Powers up slicing moves.

effetto: Attack and Special Attack are boosted for each party Pokémon that has been defeated.
descrizione: When the Pokémon enters a battle, its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are slightly boosted for each of the allies in its party that have already been defeated.

effetto: Copies ally's stat changes on entering battle.
descrizione: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it copies an ally's stat changes.

effetto: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.
descrizione: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

effetto: Prevents the opponent from using any moves that have priority, such as Quick Attack.
descrizione: The mysterious tail covering the Pokémon's head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

effetto: Restores HP when hit by a Ground-type move.
descrizione: If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

effetto: Status moves go last, but are not affected by the opponent's ability.
descrizione: The Pokémon will always act more slowly when using status moves, but these moves will be unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

effetto: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.
descrizione: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal-type and Fighting-type moves

effetto: Once per battle, when a Pokémon with Supersweet Syrup enters the battle, it lowers the evasion stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage.
descrizione: Lowers the evasion of opposing Pokémon by 1 stage when first sent into battle

effetto: When a Pokémon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.
descrizione: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP

effetto: May cause bad poisoning when the Pokémon hits an opponent with a move.
descrizione: The power of the Pokémon's toxic chain may badly poison any target the Pokémon hits with a move

effetto: Embody Aspect boosts a particular stat, depending on the form of a Terastallized Ogerpon
descrizione: The Pokémon's heart fills with memories, causing the Mask to shine and one of the Pokémon's stats to be boosted.

effetto: When Terapagos enters the battle, it turns into its Terastal Form until the end of the battle.
descrizione: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.

effetto: All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.
descrizione: The Pokémon's shell contains the powers of each type. All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.

effetto: As soon as Terapagos assumes its Stellar Form, it will immediately neutralize weather and terrain effects.
descrizione: When Terapagos changes into its Stellar Form, it uses its hidden powers to eliminate all effects of weather and terrain, reducing them to zero.

effetto: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.
descrizione: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.

effetto: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves.
descrizione: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.

effetto: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.
descrizione: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

effetto: The Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.
descrizione: Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

effetto: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.
descrizione: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.
